prompt: 我们自驾去喀纳斯，2026-06-06 到 2026-06-07，2 个成人，想住贾登峪或景区入口附近，优先停车方便、道路好走，不要只按离景区最近推荐。
expected_output: 应识别出行方式为自驾/有车，提高停车、道路可达、主路/停车场距离权重；推荐理由要解释为什么某些稍远酒店比入口附近酒店更适合自驾。

assertions.text: Output identifies the travel mode as self-driving/自驾/有车.
Output increases attention to parking, road access, main-road access, or parking-lot proximity.
Output avoids ranking only by closest distance to the scenic entrance.
Output includes recommendations and cautions tailored to self-driving.
